summary: Completed testing of Service Desk Two-Way Messaging and SLA/Auto-Assignment features. Fixed a critical route ordering bug in ticket_routes.py where /integrations and /concierges endpoints were being matched by /{ticket_id} pattern. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: SLA stats in metrics bar, channel selector (Internal/Email/WhatsApp), message channel badges, auto-assign buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering bug in /app/backend/ticket_routes.py - moved /integrations and /concierges routes BEFORE /{ticket_id} to prevent pattern matching issues
updated_files: /app/backend/ticket_routes.py - Fixed route ordering for /integrations and /concierges endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created integration test tickets via pytest (TEST_Integration User)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Desk SLA and Messaging features fully functional. Backend APIs: /api/tickets/sla/stats, /api/tickets/sla/auto-assign/{ticket_id}, /api/tickets/sla/auto-assign-all, /api/tickets/messaging/send, /api/tickets/sla/check-escalations all working. Frontend shows SLA stats in metrics bar, channel selector in reply box, and message badges in conversation thread.

backend_api_tests.test_get_sla_stats: PASS - Returns breach rate, avg response hours, by_concierge
backend_api_tests.test_auto_assign_single_ticket: PASS - Auto-assigns ticket to best available concierge
backend_api_tests.test_check_escalations: PASS - Checks and escalates overdue tickets
backend_api_tests.test_get_at_risk_tickets: PASS - Returns tickets at risk of SLA breach
backend_api_tests.test_send_email_message: PASS - Sends message via email channel
backend_api_tests.test_get_conversation_thread: PASS - Returns conversation thread for ticket
backend_api_tests.test_get_sla_rules: PASS - Returns SLA rules with defaults
backend_api_tests.test_full_ticket_workflow: PASS - Complete workflow: create -> auto-assign -> send message -> check SLA

frontend_ui_tests.sla_stats_metrics_bar: PASS - Shows SLA Breach Rate (0%) and Avg Response (-h)
frontend_ui_tests.channel_selector: PASS - Internal, Email, WhatsApp buttons visible and clickable
frontend_ui_tests.message_channel_badges: PASS - Shows email badge and Sent badge on messages
frontend_ui_tests.auto_assign_button_metrics: PASS - Auto-Assign button in metrics bar
frontend_ui_tests.check_sla_button: PASS - Check SLA button in metrics bar
frontend_ui_tests.auto_assign_button_ticket: PASS - Auto button in ticket assignment section
frontend_ui_tests.conversation_thread: PASS - Shows messages with channel indicators

route_ordering_bug.issue: /integrations and /concierges endpoints were returning 404 because they were being matched by /{ticket_id} pattern first
route_ordering_bug.fix: Moved /integrations and /concierges routes BEFORE /{ticket_id} route to ensure proper pattern matching
route_ordering_bug.verification: Both endpoints now return correct data

sla_tracking.sla_stats_endpoint: Working - returns breach rate, avg response hours
sla_tracking.breached_tickets: Working - returns tickets past SLA deadline
sla_tracking.at_risk_tickets: Working - returns tickets approaching SLA deadline

auto_assignment.single_ticket: Working - assigns based on rules (emergency to senior, round robin)
auto_assignment.all_unassigned: Working - bulk assigns all unassigned tickets
auto_assignment.concierge_availability: Working - respects max tickets and availability

two_way_messaging.email_send: Working - sends via Resend API with tracking
two_way_messaging.conversation_thread: Working - shows all messages with channel badges

escalation_engine.check_escalations: Working - escalates breached tickets, sends notifications
